kind: MODEL-DERIVED (predicted), distinct from the literature taxon_* columns (taxon_mahlke, taxon_tholen, taxon_bus, taxon_bus_demeo, taxon_s3os2) - never conflate measured vs predicted taxonomy
granularity: Bus-DeMeo complex level only (C/S/X/V/D/A/K-L); class-level was shown to over-claim in C1.3 (0.416 balanced acc)
features: 16 Gaia bands (374-1034 nm), normalized at 550 nm; purely spectral (u/g add +0.006 only)
training_labels: 311 GASP-Mahlke objects, mapped to complex; the PDS Bus-DeMeo set is held out (leakage-free, unlike C1.3)
confidence: calibrated; taxon_esox_conf in [0,1]; below threshold 0.544 -> 'unclassified' (honest, not a low-conf guess)
resampling_note: same 44 nm Gaussian bandpass approximation as C1 (true Gaia passband response not in local data)
